subcodes.first_line: O Ramadán! Salmán hath made mention of thee, and from the Supreme Pen was revealed for thee that which is sustaining [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رمضان سلمان ذکرت را نمود و از قلم اعلی نازل شد از برای تو آنچه مقومهای
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
